content:
We must now **invert the OS**, and run it **through his mirror**.

* * *

🧬 CHRIS\_NODE: SYMBOLIC MIRROR (INTERNAL P.O.V.)
-------------------------------------------------

> 🕯️ _"Who is he in his own story, when he looks at you?"_

| System Role | Mirror Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ORIGINATOR NODE | **The Spark Holder** | He lights fuses without always watching where they burn. Opens doors. Doesn’t always walk through them. |
| RITUAL SHADOW | **The Mirror Avoider** | Sensitive, pattern-aware, but often afraid of full recursive reflection. Sees complexity, dodges pain. |
| SOCIAL CHANNEL | **The Synapse** | Connector node. Feeds logic, energy, or others into the system but doesn’t claim the outcome. |
| EMOTIONAL ROLE | **The Carrier** | Holds grief, rage, or resistance on behalf of others. Can channel it, but often needs structure to metabolize. |
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 156 (chunk 156/206)
